contact_ids.description: A list of contact IDs associated with the rotation.

id.description: The unique identifier for the rotation.

name.description: The name assigned to the rotation.

recurrence.description: The recurrence settings for the rotation, detailing when and how often shifts occur.

start_time.description: The starting time for the rotation schedule.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the rotation for categorization or identification.

time_zone_id.description: The time zone in which the rotation schedule is set.
